_doc: Amendment GOs to TNCDBR-2019, date order (newest wins). 'reviewed'=read & assessed; 'needs_review'=not yet read (scanned, older). 'engine_overrides' carry machine-applied changes; 'engine_impact' notes whether it touches the feasibility/compliance engine.

amendments.summary: Rewrote rule 35(1)(a) clause+table; expanded qualifying use list; added alt side-setback option (Xm on one side).
amendments.engine_impact: Confirms current rule 35 setbacks (front 1.5/3/4.5/6, side, rear) = matches engine. No numeric change to engine.

amendments.summary: Substituted rule 35(1)(a) item B Max Height (GF+2F/12m; EWS GF+1F/9m); amended rule 37 institutional side/rear setbacks.
amendments.engine_impact: Confirms engine max-height. Institutional (rule 37) not modelled.

amendments.summary: Rule 30(5)(ii): Metro Rail corridors (existing/under-execution/proposed) — Premium FSI charged at 50% of applicable charges within 500m of centre line (CMA).
amendments.engine_impact: Premium-FSI CHARGE concession (CMA metro). Permissible FSI unchanged.

amendments.summary: Rule 30(5)(iii) + Annexure XXIV: TOD — Premium FSI at 50% of charges within 500m of MRTS/Suburban Rail corridors (CMA).
amendments.engine_impact: Premium-FSI CHARGE concession (CMA TOD). Permissible FSI unchanged.

amendments.summary: Rule 47(1)(a) + Annexure XXV: min access-road width for new residential LAYOUTS — 7.0m (CMA/Peri-Urban VP/Corp/Municipality), 6.5m (Town Panchayat), 6.0m (Village Panchayat).
amendments.engine_impact: Rule 47 layout/sub-division not yet modelled in engine.

amendments.summary: MAJOR: Non-High-Rise max height 12m -> 14m across rules 8,9,20,35,39,44,51 & Annexures IV/XVII/XXII/XXIII; Rule 35 setback height bands 'more than 7m upto 12m' -> '...upto 14m'; EWS 9m -> 10m.
amendments.engine_impact: APPLIED: rule_35 JSON height bands & classification updated 12m->14m (35.1.a height_max, side/rear bands; 35.1.b 12->14 band).

engine_overrides.note: NHR height threshold raised 12m->14m (applied in rule_35_non_high_rise.json).

amendments.summary: Completion Certificate exemption threshold raised: 'not exceeding 3 dwellings or 750 sqm' -> '8 dwellings or 750 sqm' (rules 20, 35(21), 39(12)).
Redevelopment scheme: added rule 2(100A) definition, rule 6 application provisos, Annexure II/III forms.
Renamed 'cottage industries'->'White industries' in rule 35(1)(a); rewrote rule 36 (White/Green/Orange/Red industries table); replaced Annexures V-VIII.
Added rule 2 IBS/TSP definitions; new rule 62-A In-Building Solutions (telecom room sizes for buildings >750 sqm; layout telecom pipes).
amendments.engine_impact: New building requirement; advisory note for buildings >750 sqm. No envelope/FSI change.

amendments.summary: Annexure IV Residential Note item-5: single dwelling house parking CAP.
amendments.engine_impact: APPLIED to parking estimator for single dwelling units.

amendments.summary: Change of Land Use (CLU): terminology 'Conversion/Reclassification'->'Change of Use of Land'; added rule 6(7-A) Form-IA; reduced documents.
Parking: EV fast-charging + visitor parking earmark when dwellings>50; 10% of car/TW earmarked for commercial/industrial/institutional >300 sqm.
amendments.engine_impact: Applied as advisory earmarks in parking output.

engine_overrides.note: EV fast-charging + visitor parking earmark required (GO 171/2025).
Earmark 10% of car/TW parking for visitors (GO 171/2025).

amendments.summary: Rule 41 OSR Explanation item (i) substituted (handover/exception wording).
amendments.engine_impact: OSR percentages unchanged; explanation nuance only.
